basic_details.job_title: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad)
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) has released the official Technical Manpower (Laboratory Instructor) Recruitment 2026 notification under Advertisement No. 03/2026 at https://www.mnnit.ac.in/. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower (Laboratory Instructor) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with an M.Sc. in Chemistry and a maximum age limit of 50 years can attend the walk-in interview on 14 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are provided below.

all_official_links.label: Download MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] Recruitment 2026 - Overview
MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MNNIT Allahabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] Recruitment 2026 - Salary
MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] post at MNNIT Allahabad is scheduled for 14th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Manpower position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] position is M.Sc. in Chemistry. Candidates must possess this degree to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] post is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Manpower role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Manpower post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] position at MNNIT Allahabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive at MNNIT Allahabad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Technical Manpower post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] post will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity for the Technical Manpower [Laboratory Instructor] position at MNNIT Allahabad.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if any, category certificate if applicable), and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q10. Where is MNNIT Allahabad located?
faq.answer: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211004.
